modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to print due to error 49.FF05.

full_description_text:  
I tried to print a document using my USB printer, but it didn't work. Instead, I received an error message stating "49.FF05 Service Error." I'm not sure what caused this issue, and I just need to get my printing done.
short_description: Unable to print due to error 49.FF05.
description: I tried to print a document using my USB printer, but it didn't work. Instead, I received an error message stating "49.FF05 Service Error." I'm not sure what caused this issue, and I just need to get my printing done.
